response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced senior engineer with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD) and some high-scale systems exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, but the profile does not match a Principal/IC6 growth-and-experimentation role. There is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis work, and no demonstrated multi-workstream technical leadership across teams at the principal level. The career trajectory is solid senior IC work, mostly on product and platform features, which falls short of the role's core requirements around experimentation quality, bias detection, and org-wide measurement systems.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend systems
High-scale, low-latency systems experience (micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, and open-source contributions
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience
No evidence of principal-level scope: multi-team architecture ownership or cross-org technical leadership
Limited telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical analysis background required by the role

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering breadth and scale exposure
